title: Belt Buckle
description: While you have no potions, you have [blue]2[/blue] additional [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Dexterity is dynamically applied when your potion inventory is empty and removed when you obtain potions. The effect updates after combat, potion use, and inventory changes.
